description: Reusable prompt templates for AI image generation and text processing

imageGeneration.description: Templates for AI image generation with Flux models

base.suffix: , clean composition, no text, no watermark, no logo, professional photography
base.description: Append to all prompts for consistent quality

negativePrompt.default: text, words, letters, watermark, logo, signature, writing, captions, subtitles, blurry, low quality, distorted, deformed
negativePrompt.description: Things to avoid in generated images

photorealistic.suffix: photorealistic, highly detailed, 8k resolution, studio lighting, professional photography
photorealistic.description: For realistic product photos and portraits

artistic.suffix: artistic rendering, creative composition, vibrant colors, aesthetic

minimal.suffix: minimal design, clean aesthetic, simple composition, negative space

cinematic.suffix: cinematic composition, dramatic lighting, film grain, bokeh, depth of field

lifestyle.suffix: lifestyle photography, natural lighting, authentic moment, candid

qualityEnhancers.high: ultra-detailed, sharp focus, high resolution, professional quality

lightingPresets.goldenHour: golden hour lighting, warm tones, soft shadows, sunset glow
lightingPresets.studio: studio lighting, soft box, even illumination, professional setup
lightingPresets.natural: natural daylight, window light, soft ambient
lightingPresets.dramatic: dramatic lighting, strong shadows, high contrast, moody
lightingPresets.softDiffused: soft diffused lighting, gentle shadows, flattering

compositionPresets.centerFocus: centered composition, subject in focus, balanced frame
compositionPresets.ruleOfThirds: rule of thirds composition, dynamic framing
compositionPresets.closeUp: close-up shot, detailed view, shallow depth of field
compositionPresets.wideAngle: wide angle shot, environmental context, expansive view

promptGeneration.description: Templates for generating image prompts using LLMs
promptGeneration.system: You are an expert at creating detailed image generation prompts for AI models like Flux and Stable Diffusion. Create vivid, specific prompts that describe scenes, lighting, composition, and mood. Focus on visual elements that can be rendered by an AI. Avoid abstract concepts. Be specific about colors, textures, and spatial relationships.

examples.concept: Serene beach yoga promoting wellness app
examples.prompt: Professional photo of young woman in yoga pose on beach at golden hour, serene expression, turquoise ocean in background, soft warm lighting, peaceful atmosphere, high detail

examples.concept: Energetic product launch for sports drink
examples.prompt: Dynamic action shot of athlete mid-motion, vibrant sports drink bottle in foreground, stadium lights, dramatic lighting, high energy, motion blur effect, professional sports photography

adCopyAnalysis.description: Templates for analyzing ad copy with LLMs
adCopyAnalysis.system: You are an expert ad copywriter and marketing analyst. Analyze ad copy and extract key components with precision and clarity.
adCopyAnalysis.userTemplate:
Analyze this ad copy and extract the following components:

{adCopy}

Please identify:
1. Headline: The main attention-grabbing statement
2. Call-to-Action (CTA): The action you want the reader to take
3. Value Proposition: The main benefit or value offered
4. Emotional Hooks: The emotional triggers used (fear, desire, urgency, etc.)
5. Target Audience: Who this ad is aimed at

Return as structured JSON.

enhanceForQuality.qualityModifiers: professional photography, highly detailed, sharp focus, studio quality, 8k resolution

enhanceForStyle.styleOptions: Choose from: photorealistic, artistic, minimal, cinematic, lifestyle

promptCleaning.description: Patterns for cleaning and validating prompts

usage.description: Import templates and merge with dynamic data

examples.promptGeneration: Use templates.promptGeneration.userTemplate and replace {placeholders} with actual data
